envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Main Simmer API key used by the skill.

envVars.name: MARKET_ID
envVars.description: Target Simmer market id for automated runs.

envVars.name: TRADE_SIZE
envVars.description: Trade amount in dollars or venue units, default 5.0.

envVars.name: MIN_EDGE
envVars.description: Minimum probability edge required before trading, default 0.05.

envVars.name: REASONING_PREFIX
envVars.description: Human-readable prefix for the public reasoning string.

envVars.name: LIVE_VENUE
envVars.description: Venue used when --live is passed, default polymarket.
